item.title: Science is less deterministic than you think
item.description: This is a comment on the paper Same data, different analysts Unless you have been living under a rock, you know that we are in the midst of what historians may one day call “The Replication Crisis Era”.

item.title: index
item.description: Welcome to Weak Priors This is a place to share some thoughts. At the moment, this place is under active construction.

item.title: Books read in 2026
item.description: Books I have been reading this year La Guerra Civil (graphic novel)- Paul Preston y José Pablo García. (3.5).

item.title: Recommended books
item.description: A few goods I would recommend, in no particular order.

item.title: Things I want to read
item.description: A collection of books and articles that I would like to read at some point Papers Real Patterns by Daniel C.

item.title: My first comic
item.description: Today I have been doing something I had been waiting to do for a long time: a comic using AI.

item.title: Simulating an Alien Fauna
item.description: For the past few days, I have been simulating a population of “aliens” to create original teaching materials for an upcoming phylogenetics workshop.

item.title: Risks of Cultural Abundance
item.description: We live in a time with endless opportunities to consume all sorts of cultural products.
